name: plugin-hive
description: Hive — workflow orchestration for Claude Code. Multi-agent swarms for planning, development, testing, and code review with quality gates, agent memories, and daily ceremony workflow.

hooks.command:
mkdir -p state/interrupts && ts=$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H%M%SZ) && printf 'interrupted_at: "%s"
interruption_type: forced_stop
active_epic: null
active_story: null
active_step: null
' "$ts" > "state/interrupts/$ts.yaml"
